text:
LONG NAME: OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1115_DEMO_WVR_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APL base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes 
COMMENT: 
This data element is triggered by a value of “01” (1115 demonstration waiver program) in any instance 
of MC_PLAN_OPRTG_AUTHRTY_CD. Please note that this indicator is not set to 1 when there is an 
instance of MC_PLAN_OPRTG_AUTHRTY_CD set to “19” or “23” (1115 demonstration concurrent with 
another operating authority). 
^
